response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience across web, embedded, and GIS systems, but the role demands a director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows ~14-16 years depending on counting, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, no cloud/AI strategy leadership, and only recent, light exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP) at current role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) is well below Principal/Director IC expectations for this position.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating end-to-end product ownership
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at platform scale
Career level (Senior/Staff) below Principal/Director IC bar; no evidence of org-wide technical leadership
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-strategy or strategic-customer advisory experience
